Index.title: Upgrade Your AI's Brain
Index.subtitle: Equip Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, Antigravity, Claude Code, Codex, GitHub Copilot and other AI Agents with expert programming superpowers via a single interactive prompt.
Index.contribute_desc: Does your team have unique coding standards? You can easily build a completely customized AI brain! If you have any awesome frameworks or best-practices you'd like to share, create an Issue on GitHub so we can add it to devskill.
Index.architecture_desc: More than just a CLI, devskill provides a clearly stratified Knowledge Base management pipeline.
Index.sources_desc: The raw data layer. Stores official documentation, template repos, and guidelines (often tracked as git submodules). AI reads this to generate your SKILL.md rules.
Index.vendor_desc: Your external dependency layer. Automatically syncs community or third-party high-quality skills into your project. Keep them fresh with a single 'npm start sync'.

Hero.description: Skip the tedious setup. Pick your favorite tech stacks from our interactive CLI, and let devskill inject specialized project guidelines (SKILL.md) directly into your AI.

onboarding.title: Instant Integration
onboarding.desc: Launch the visual CLI, select frameworks, and watch context stream directly into your .agents/skills folder.

accuracy.title: Senior-Level Quality
accuracy.desc: From deep Vue patterns to strict Phoenix Ecto rules, your AI gets zero-hallucination context to write code the right way.

frictionless.title: 1-Tap Install & Update
frictionless.desc: Using npx devskill, adding superpowers to your AI has never been faster or looked this good.
